category_sources: source_facts.description says Stubby is a DNS privacy enabled stub resolver service based on getdns.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is stubby; official DNS Privacy page names it DNS Privacy Daemon - Stubby.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official DNS Privacy Stubby page; current official page is dnsprivacy.org/dns_privacy_daemon_-_stubby/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/getdnsapi/stubby, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a DNS privacy stub resolver; official DNS Privacy page says Stubby encrypts DNS queries.
